description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a deep charcoal gray fabric upholstery and a minimalist design. The sofa features a single, seamless seat cushion and a straight, continuous backrest, both of which are generously padded for comfort. Arranged along the backrest are seven loose throw pillows in a mix of neutral tones—white, gray, and dark green—with varied patterns and textures, adding visual interest and a cozy feel. The armrests are straight, wide, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and contributing to the sofa's boxy silhouette. The legs are short and barely visible, giving the sofa a grounded, low-profile appearance. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern living rooms, or communal lounge areas.
description: A modern, charcoal gray sofa with a single seat cushion, straight padded armrests, and seven assorted throw pillows in neutral tones. The design is minimalist and low-profile, with subtle, barely visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the sofa, the single seat cushion, and all seven throw pillows in their varied arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the sofa, the thickness of the armrest, and the layered arrangement of the pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, straight backrest and the tops of the pillows, with minimal leg visibility.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest profile and the staggered pillow placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, seamless seat cushion and seven loose, varied-size back pillows arranged in a single row along the backrest; pillows are not uniform and are freely placed.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and padded armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are short, minimally visible, likely block-style and positioned at the corners, possibly recessed and finished in a dark material.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at medium height, with no visible segmentation or tufting, supporting loose back pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture; no visible decorative stitching or patterning on the main upholstery, but pillows feature varied patterns and textures.
